title: agropyron elongatum var. corsicum
intro: Agropyron elongatum var. corsicum, also known as Corsican wheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Corsican wheatgrass include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Corsican wheatgrass are often used in teas, infusions, and supplements, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a convenient and accessible way.
